productOrServiceInformation.descriptionOfContractRequirement: BASIC AWARD FOR THE GLOBAL TACTICAL ADVANCED COMMUNICATIONS SYSTEMS (GTACS) PREDOMINANTLY HARDWARE CONTRACT WITH INCIDENTAL SERVICES TO SUPPORT PROGRAM EXECUTIVE OFFICE COMMAND, CONTROL, COMMUNICATIONS-TACTICAL (PEO-C3T).  THIS IS A MULTIPLE AWARD IDIQ CONTRACT.

contractMarketingData.orderingProcedure: This contract, under certain circumstances, may be extended to other Federal agencies requiring tactical C3 systems, equipment and services.  However, the Contracting Officer and Program Manager (PM) Warfighter Information Network-Tactical (WIN-T) must be contacted first.  Any fee, if applicable, will vary dependent upon complexity of requirement.
